revision.text:
[[commons:Category:Akaba-jinja]][[ja:赤羽神社]] {{Expand Japanese|赤羽神社}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Akaba Shrine | native_name = 赤羽神社 | image = 赤羽神社.JPG | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Akaba Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|34.662255|135.005054}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | deity = {{ill|Tamanooya-no-Mikoto|lt=Tamanooya no Mikoto|en|Tamanooya-no-Mikoto|ja|玉祖命|zh|玉祖命|qid=Q11572729|1=Tamanooya-no-Mikoto}} }} {{nihongo|'''Akaba Shrine'''|赤羽神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Harima Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * Hiteisha|ja|比定社|qid=Q135026601|1=Shikinai Hiteisha}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|Q11498723|ltq=Q11498723|qid=Q11498723|1=List of Shikinaisha in Harima Province}} ** Series ordinal: 6 ** P155: administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Nishi-ku, Kobe|lt=Nishi-ku|ar|نيشي-كو|ceb|Nishi-ku (subdistrito sa Hapon, Hyōgo-ken)|de|Nishi-ku (Kōbe)|en|Nishi-ku, Kobe|fr|Nishi-ku (Kobe)|id|Nishi-ku, Kobe|it|Nishi-ku (Kōbe)|ja|西区 (神戸市)|ko|니시구 (고베시)|ru|Ниси-ку (Кобе)|tr|Nishi, Kobe|vi|Nishi, Kobe|zh|西區 (神戶市)|qid=Q1154552|1=Nishi-ku, Kobe}} * {{ill|Q1047523|ltq=Q1047523|qid=Q1047523|1=Harima Province}} * {{ill|Akashi District, Hyōgo|lt=Akashi district|en|Akashi District, Hyōgo|ja|明石郡|zh|明石郡|qid=Q11512561|1=Akashi District, Hyōgo}} == ᥓᥣᥱ ᥙᥣᥢᥱ|tet|Japaun|te|జపాన్|tg|Ҷопон|th|ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|thnews|หมวดหมู่:ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|tig|ጃፓን|ti|ጃፓን|tk|Ýaponiýa|tl|Hapon|tly|Japonijə|tn|Japan|tok|ma Nijon|to|Siapani|tpi|Siapan|trv|Tanah Tunux|tr|Japonya|trnews|Kategori:Japonya|trquote|Japonya|trvoyage|Japonya|ts|Japani|tt|Япония|tum|Japan|tw|Japan|tyv|Япония|ty|Tāpōnē|udm|Япония|ug|ياپونىيە|uk|Японія|uknews|Категорія:Японія|ukquote|Японія|ukvoyage|Японія|ur|جاپان|uz|Yaponiya|vec|Japon|vep|Japonii|ve|Japan|vi|Nhật Bản|vibooks|Các quốc gia/Nhật Bản|vivoyage|Nhật Bản|vls|Japan|vo|Yapän|war|Hapon|wa|Djapon|wo|Sapoŋ|wuu|日本|xal|Ниxуудин Нутг|xh|IJapani|xmf|იაპონია|yi|יאפאן|yo|Japan|za|Nyiedbonj|zea|Japan|zgh|ⵏⵉⴱⵓⵏ|zh_classical|日本|zh_min_nan|Ji̍t-pún|zh_yue|日本|zh|日本|zhnews|Category:日本|zhquote|日本|zhvoyage|日本|zu|IJaphani|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == name in kana (P1814) == * あかばじんじゃ == location (P276) == * {{ill|Ikawadani-chō|lt=Ikawadani-chō|ja|伊川谷町|qid=Q11379344|1=Ikawadani-chō}} == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 3140005000912 == Commons category (P373) == * Akaba-jinja == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '兵庫県神戸市西区伊川谷町潤和1445', 'language': 'ja'} {{commons category|Category:Akaba-jinja}} [[JA:赤羽神社]] {{wikidata link|Q20042898}} == Japanese content == {{Shrine |Name = Akaba Shrine |Image = [[File:Akaba Shrine.JPG|250px]]
Worship hall |Location = {{ill|lt=Hyōgo Prefecture|Q130290|qid=Q130290|1=Hyōgo Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Kobe City|Q48320|qid=Q48320|1=Kobe}}{{ill|lt=Nishi Ward (Kobe City)|Q1154552|qid=Q1154552|lt=Nishi Ward|1=Nishi-ku, Kobe}} 1445 Junna, Ikawadani-chō |Coordinates = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |Enshrined deities = {{ill|lt=Tamanooya no Mikoto|Q11572729|qid=Q11572729|lt=Ame no Hakarutama no Kami|1=Tamanooya-no-Mikoto}}
{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Izanagi no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}
{{ill|lt=Kagutsuchi|Q1640658|qid=Q1640658|lt=Kagu-tsuchi no Mikoto|1=Kagu-tsuchi}}
{{ill|lt=Amaterasu Ōmikami|Q455602|qid=Q455602|lt=Ōhirume Muchi no Mikoto|1=Amaterasu}} |Shrine rank = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} (minor)
Former {{ill|lt=Modern shrine ranking system|Q712534|qid=Q712534|lt=village shrine|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}} |Founded = Unknown |Honden = |Alternate names = |Annual festival = October 10
Autumn Festival (second Sunday and Monday of October) |Rites = |Map = {{Location map|Kobe|label=Akaba Shrine|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=250}} }} '''Akaba Shrine''' (あかばじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in Ikawadani-chō, {{ill|lt=Nishi Ward (Kobe City)|Q1154552|qid=Q1154552|lt=Nishi Ward|1=Nishi-ku, Kobe}}, {{ill|lt=Kobe City|Q48320|qid=Q48320|1=Kobe}}, {{ill|lt=Hyōgo Prefecture|Q130290|qid=Q130290|1=Hyōgo Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}}, and under the {{ill|lt=Modern shrine ranking system|Q712534|qid=Q712534|lt=former shrine ranking|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}} it was classified as a {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}. === Enshrined deities === === Principal deity === * {{ill|lt=Tamanooya no Mikoto|Q11572729|qid=Q11572729|lt=Ame no Hakarutama no Kami|1=Tamanooya-no-Mikoto}} (Ame no Hakarutama no Kami) === Associated deities === * {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Izanagi no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} (Izanagi no Mikoto) * {{ill|lt=Kagutsuchi|Q1640658|qid=Q1640658|lt=Kagu-tsuchi no Mikoto|1=Kagu-tsuchi}} (Kagutsuchi no Mikoto) * {{ill|lt=Amaterasu Ōmikami|Q455602|qid=Q455602|lt=Ōhirume Muchi no Mikoto|1=Amaterasu}} (Ōhirume Muchi no Mikoto) === History === The name “Akaba” is said to derive from the “Hane-akadama” (Red Feather Jewel) that {{ill|lt=Ame no Hiboko|Q713100|qid=Q713100|lt=Ame no Hiboko|1=Amenohiboko}} brought to Japan during the reign of {{ill|lt=Emperor Suinin|Q314850|qid=Q314850|1=Emperor Suinin}}[http://nature1818.jp/kobe/ Akaba, Junna, Ikawadani-chō, Nishi Ward, Kobe City, Hyōgo Prefecture | Akaba Travelogue] Accessed February 1, 2019. In the {{ill|lt=Engishiki|Q1342448|qid=Q1342448|1=Engishiki}} {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|qid=Q11064932|lt=Register of Deities|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}, compiled in {{ill|lt=Enchō (era)|Q1327274|qid=Q1327274|lt=Enchō|1=Enchō}} 5 ({{ill|lt=927|Q30470|qid=Q30470|1=927}}), it is listed as “Akaba Shrine” in {{ill|lt=Harima Province|Q1047523|qid=Q1047523|1=Harima Province}} {{ill|lt=Akashi District|Q11512561|qid=Q11512561|1=Akashi District, Hyōgo}}, and is included among the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}}. The {{ill|lt=Dictionary of Japanese Place Names|Q17213149|qid=Q17213149|1=Dai Nippon Chimei Jisho}} contains the description, “The Engishiki Akaba Shrine is located in Akaba (Akaha) of Izawa-no-shō, Izumi Village,” suggesting that the name once remained as a place name as well. === Grounds === File:Akaba-jinja, shaden.jpg|Shrine buildings File:Akaba-jinja, honden.jpg|Main hall File:Akaba-jinja, keidaisha.jpg|Auxiliary shrine within the grounds File:Akaba-jinja, shinmon.jpg|Sacred gate File:Akaba-jinja, entrance.jpg|Entrance to the grounds File:Akaba-jinja, torii.jpg|Torii gate === Notes === {{Notes help}} {{Reflist}} === External links === {{Commonscat|Akaba-jinja}} * [http://www.hyogo-jinjacho.com/data/6301253.html Akaba Shrine] – Hyōgo Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines {{shinto-stub}} {{Shinto horizontal}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Akaba Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Akaba Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Akaba Shrine]][[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Harima Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Kobe]] [[Category:神戸市西区の歴史]] [[Category:神戸市西区の建築物]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Harima Province]] [[Category:Son-sha in Hyōgo Prefecture]]
